symptom_description: Discharge temperature differential spiked (`+100`°C across stage 2). Compressor output flow reduced (`-50%` SCFM) with distinct clattering.
root_cause: Ingestion of particulate grit (`258 ppm` concentration) through torn air intake filter element (`60-mesh`) eroded suction valve sealing face.
action_taken: Installed new valve plates, springs, and seats (`P/N 3999-C`); torqued head bolts to factory specification (`125 ft-lbs`) and tested capacity (`30 PSI`).
parts_used: Reed Valve Replacement Pack, Valve Cover O-Ring Set, Fastener Kit

symptom_description: Belt slip alarm triggered (`drastic` RPM mismatch between motor and compressor end). Black rubber dust accumulating under drive guard (`0.10 inch` pile).
root_cause: Oil mist drip (`32 ppm` contamination) from minor shaft seal leak contaminated V-belt rubber, causing softening and loss of friction grip (`57%` grip loss).
action_taken: Swapped out glazed V-belts with new matched set (`P/N 7202-REV2`), verified pulley groove profiles for wear (`0.012 tolerance`), and torqued slide rail bolts (`113 ft-lbs`).
parts_used: Replacement Drive Belt Kit, Sheave Lock Bushings, Tension Bolts

symptom_description: Compressor cycling on high temp interlock (`> 134°C`). Cooling fan running (`50 Hz`) but `noticeable` temperature drop across aftercooler (`84`°C out). Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit DRYER-201.
root_cause: Thermal bypass valve failed in closed position (`stuck at 137°C`), preventing hot oil from circulating through external cooler core under `60` Amps load.
action_taken: Replaced faulty thermostatic oil bypass valve assembly (`P/N 1783-B`), topped off compressor oil level (`45 lbs`), and cleaned cooler core exterior.
parts_used: Thermostatic Oil Bypass Valve Kit, Compressor Oil (1 Gal), O-Ring Set

symptom_description: Loud intermittent metallic clicking and grinding inside compressor cylinder head during compression stroke. Capacity down by `concerning` (`50%` drop).
root_cause: Corrosive chemical vapor (`pH 8.9`) drawn through intake air stream pitted stainless reed valves during `26033` hours of runtime.
action_taken: Swapped out stage 1 and 2 valve packs (`Spec-820`), replaced O-ring seals (`P/N 7124-REV2`), and verified volumetric efficiency (`+27%` flow).
parts_used: Suction Valve Pack Stage 1, Discharge Valve Pack Stage 2, Gasket Kit

symptom_description: Oil reservoir foaming alarm triggered (`+0.12 inch` foam layer). Air/oil separator pressure drop climbed from 3 PSI to `8.4 PSI`.
root_cause: Mixing of incompatible lubricant brands (`polyglycol vs PAO`) during top-off by operations caused chemical precipitation and heavy foaming (`22%` volume increase).
action_taken: Drained contaminated fluid (`317 ppm` moisture), replaced thermostatic mixing valve element (`Spec-997`), renewed filters, and filled with certified compressor lubricant (`Spec-740`).
parts_used: Thermostatic Bypass Valve Element, Oil Filter Assembly, Separator Element, ISO VG 46 Lube

symptom_description: Compressor unable to build discharge pressure above `63` PSI (`target 48 PSI`). High interstage temperature (`101`°C) on stage 1 cylinder.
root_cause: Fatigue fracture of stainless steel valve plate/reed inside discharge valve assembly due to billions of cyclic flexures over `38960` hours.
action_taken: Isolated compressor, removed cylinder head, and replaced complete suction and discharge valve assemblies (`P/N 8172-X`) and gaskets (`Spec-678`).
parts_used: Suction and Discharge Valve Assembly Kit, Cylinder Head Gasket Set

symptom_description: Compressor speed dropping during load cycle (`34%` slip). Severe metallic clattering audible near drive sheave with distinct burnt rubber smell.
root_cause: Thermal degradation (`172`°C ambient inside guard) caused premature elastomer hardening and cross-cracking across belt ribs.
action_taken: Replaced drive belt set (`P/N 1002-B`), installed shaft seal repair kit (`Spec-839`) to stop oil drip, and tensioned belts to sonic frequency (`56 Hz`).
parts_used: Matched V-Belt Pack, Compressor Shaft Lip Seal, Belt Degreaser

symptom_description: Thermal warning alarm active on compressor controller (`120`°C). Unit operating at `162` Amps with significant heat buildup inside acoustic enclosure.
root_cause: External fins of air/oil cooler core heavily fouled (`79%` blocked) with industrial airborne dust and oily mist accumulation after `3 years`.
action_taken: Pressure washed air/oil cooler radiator exterior fins (`29%` dirt cleared) with biodegradable degreaser (`P/N 7971-X`) and blown dry with low-pressure air (`30 PSI`).
parts_used: Coil Cleaning Degreaser (2 Gallons), Replacement Cooler Core Gaskets

symptom_description: High differential pressure alarm (`> 15.8 PSI`) triggered across air/oil separator element. Excessive oil carryover (`39 ppm` aerosol) into plant air header. Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to DRYER-201.
root_cause: Failure of thermostatic bypass valve (`stuck at 127°C`) caused oil to run continuously chilled, allowing condensate moisture (`417 ppm`) to emulsify.
action_taken: Flushed reservoir, replaced oil filter and separator element (`P/N 1761-X`), cleaned thermal bypass valve (`0.009 gap`), and took fresh baseline oil sample.
parts_used: Complete Maintenance Filter & Oil Kit (Separator, Oil Filter, Air Filter, Oil)

symptom_description: Oil sampling revealed `29 ppm` moisture content (`cloudy emulsion`). Discharge air carryover exceeding `95 ppm` oil concentration downstream.
root_cause: Overheating of oil (`90`°C sump temp) caused accelerated thermal coking and heavy varnish deposition across separator filter media.
action_taken: Replaced separator element (`Spec-379`), cleaned reservoir interior (`0.04 inch` varnish stripped), renewed spin-on filter (`Spec-738`), and recharged synthetic oil.
parts_used: Separator Element Kit, Spin-On Lube Filter, Varnish Cleaner (2 Gal), ISO 46 Oil

symptom_description: Oil injection temperature reaching `93`°C (`normal < 85°C`). Thermal bypass valve indicator showing maximum cooling flow without temperature drop. Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit DRYER-201.
root_cause: External fins of air/oil cooler core heavily fouled (`83%` blocked) with industrial airborne dust and oily mist accumulation after `1 years`.
action_taken: Pressure washed air/oil cooler radiator exterior fins (`46%` dirt cleared) with biodegradable degreaser (`Spec-638`) and blown dry with low-pressure air (`42 PSI`).
parts_used: Coil Cleaning Degreaser (2 Gallons), Replacement Cooler Core Gaskets

symptom_description: Stage 2 intercooling pressure fluctuating (`25 PSI +/- 25%`). Severe acoustic impact (`chattering`) detected inside discharge valve pocket. Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on DRYER-201.
root_cause: Fatigue fracture of stainless steel valve plate/reed inside discharge valve assembly due to billions of cyclic flexures over `27653` hours.
action_taken: Isolated compressor, removed cylinder head, and replaced complete suction and discharge valve assemblies (`Spec-445`) and gaskets (`P/N 1054-A`).
parts_used: Suction and Discharge Valve Assembly Kit, Cylinder Head Gasket Set

symptom_description: Compressor unable to build discharge pressure above `41` PSI (`target 69 PSI`). High interstage temperature (`109`°C) on stage 1 cylinder.
root_cause: Broken valve spring (`Spec-710`) allowed valve disc to flutter and slam against guard, cracking valve seating surface under `35 PSI` cycling.
action_taken: Replaced broken stage 1 and stage 2 discharge valve assemblies (`Spec-644`), renewed head gaskets, and replaced intake air filter element (`P/N 8501-C`).
parts_used: Stage 1 Discharge Valve Assembly, Stage 2 Valve Kit, Intake Filter Element

symptom_description: Oil sight glass shows excessive dark, foamy oil with heavy sludge formation. Compressor running `119`°C above normal discharge temp (`alarm 105°C`).
root_cause: Failure of thermostatic bypass valve (`stuck at 175°C`) caused oil to run continuously chilled, allowing condensate moisture (`294 ppm`) to emulsify.
action_taken: Flushed reservoir, replaced oil filter and separator element (`Spec-870`), cleaned thermal bypass valve (`0.013 gap`), and took fresh baseline oil sample.
parts_used: Complete Maintenance Filter & Oil Kit (Separator, Oil Filter, Air Filter, Oil)

symptom_description: Ops noted compressor running continuously without unloading (`137` Amps draw) and failing to reach header setpoint (`61 PSI`).
root_cause: Corrosive chemical vapor (`pH 9.3`) drawn through intake air stream pitted stainless reed valves during `17688` hours of runtime.
action_taken: Swapped out stage 1 and 2 valve packs (`Spec-980`), replaced O-ring seals (`P/N 2326-REV2`), and verified volumetric efficiency (`+19%` flow).
parts_used: Suction Valve Pack Stage 1, Discharge Valve Pack Stage 2, Gasket Kit

symptom_description: High discharge temperature trip (`> 104°C`) activated. Air blowing back through intake air filter assembly during unloader cycle (`22.0 PSI`).
root_cause: Fatigue fracture of stainless steel valve plate/reed inside discharge valve assembly due to billions of cyclic flexures over `11824` hours.
action_taken: Isolated compressor, removed cylinder head, and replaced complete suction and discharge valve assemblies (`P/N 4051-A`) and gaskets (`Spec-153`).
parts_used: Suction and Discharge Valve Assembly Kit, Cylinder Head Gasket Set

symptom_description: Stage 2 intercooling pressure fluctuating (`55 PSI +/- 68%`). Severe acoustic impact (`high-pitched squealing`) detected inside discharge valve pocket. Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on DRYER-201.
root_cause: Broken valve spring (`P/N 5158-A`) allowed valve disc to flutter and slam against guard, cracking valve seating surface under `39 PSI` cycling.
action_taken: Replaced broken stage 1 and stage 2 discharge valve assemblies (`P/N 6392-X`), renewed head gaskets, and replaced intake air filter element (`P/N 1355-C`).
parts_used: Stage 1 Discharge Valve Assembly, Stage 2 Valve Kit, Intake Filter Element

symptom_description: Oil analysis report indicates high acid number (`TAN > 1.9%`) and severe particulate depletion (`171 ppm` wear metals) of anti-wear additives. Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit DRYER-201.
root_cause: Air/oil separator element rupture (`0.25 inch` tear) caused by differential pressure spikes (`> 52 PSI`) during rapid load/unload cycling.
action_taken: Installed upgraded coalescence separator element (`Spec-303`), drained emulsified oil (`49 lbs`), flushed sump, and verified `< 2 ppm` carryover.
parts_used: Coalescing Air/Oil Separator, Synthetic PAO Oil (10 Gal), Flushing Solvent

symptom_description: Belt slip alarm triggered (`drastic` RPM mismatch between motor and compressor end). Black rubber dust accumulating under drive guard (`0.04 inch` pile).
root_cause: Oil mist drip (`248 ppm` contamination) from minor shaft seal leak contaminated V-belt rubber, causing softening and loss of friction grip (`55%` grip loss).
action_taken: Swapped out glazed V-belts with new matched set (`P/N 6887-X`), verified pulley groove profiles for wear (`0.009 tolerance`), and torqued slide rail bolts (`70 ft-lbs`).
parts_used: Replacement Drive Belt Kit, Sheave Lock Bushings, Tension Bolts

symptom_description: Discharge temperature differential spiked (`+105`°C across stage 2). Compressor output flow reduced (`-57%` SCFM) with intermittent clattering. Note: Vibration and harmonic resonance appear transmitted from DRYER-201.
root_cause: Over-torquing of valve cover hold-down bolts (`37 ft-lbs`) warped valve seat assembly by `0.010 inch`, causing internal blow-by.
action_taken: Rebuilt concentric valve assemblies (`P/N 5922-REV2`), honed valve seating pockets (`0.019 tolerance`), and verified interstage pressure (`79 PSI`).
parts_used: Concentric Valve Rebuild Kit, Valve Pocket O-Rings, Synthetic Lubricant
